ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "chlorophyll" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration in the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH of the water */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen concentration in the water */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source (e.g., IoT sensor, manual sample) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for data collection */,
  "data_collect_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., grab sample, continuous monitoring) */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location of the sample (e.g., upstream, downstream) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating data quality issues (e.g., out of range, missing values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., river, lake, coastal) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., IoT sensor, manual sample) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was last calibrated */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was last maintained */,
  "instrument_description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality assurance record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being quality assured */,
  "qa_activity" TEXT /* Type of quality assurance activity (e.g., calibration check, data validation) */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date the quality assurance activity was performed */,
  "qa_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality assurance activity */,
  "qa_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the quality assurance activity */,
  "qa_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the quality assurance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record associated with the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data (e.g., analysis, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record used for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_maintenance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record associated with the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., calibration, sampling method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES water_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration activity */,
  "calibration_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibration_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
